description: Style Note hugo Dark Blue from the house of hugo boss guarantees perfumes that you will fall in love with. With fragrances that last long and keeps you feeling fresh all day, these perfumes for men are great inclusions in your perfume collection. Product Details Hugo Dark Blue is a spray perfume for men which comes in an innovative glass flask The top notes are ginger, lime grapefruit, middle notes are cardamom, geranium, sage and base notes are vanilla, patchouli and woods Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 125 ml
